scale: Each criterion scored pass | partial | fail. Ship only when no fail remains.

universal.criterion: Exactly one playbook loaded; resolved topic matches user intent
universal.fail_if: more than one reference loaded, or topic mismatches the dominant signal

universal.criterion: Every non-obvious claim carries one evidence tag from a single family with consistent spelling
universal.fail_if: untagged claim or mixed tag families

universal.criterion: Every [ASSUMPTION] is paired with a named verification step
universal.fail_if: bare assumption with no path to confirm it

universal.criterion: Assumption ratio <=30%, else a WARNING banner with the gap list is present
No phase leakage (no target architecture, API contracts, schemas, sprint plans, pricing)
universal.fail_if: output designs the build or quotes a price

universal.criterion: Effort expressed as FTE-time, never currency
No score or dashboard presented as success
universal.fail_if: a 5 or a green state is framed as a guarantee

business-process-modeling: every gateway branch and end event resolved
to-be improvement traces to a named as-is waste
owner signed off as-is before to-be
flow-mapping: 8-12 flows, each with happy + >=1 alt/error path
one Mermaid sequenceDiagram per flow (<=12 messages)
integration matrix reconciles every cross-context arrow both directions
requirements-engineering: traceability matrix has no orphan requirements or objectives
scenario-analysis: weights sum to 1.0, locked pre-scoring, rationale stated
change-readiness: all groups scored on all 5 ADKAR dimensions
barrier = first <=3 in order, not the mean
